tool_args.label: Tremont Ave Busway Regulations - vehicle restrictions
tool_args.raw_text: 6 AM – 8 PM / 7 days a week. Only buses, trucks with 6+ wheels, Access-A-Ride vans, emergency vehicles, and bikes may travel all the way through. Passenger vehicles may make local trips by turning onto the busway from a side street and must make the first possible right turn off the busway. All left turns off the busway are prohibited, except trucks may turn left at Third Ave.

payload.description: 6 AM – 8 PM / 7 days a week: Only buses, trucks with 6+ wheels, Access-A-Ride vans, emergency vehicles, and bikes may travel all the way through on Tremont Ave., eastbound from Third Ave. to Southern Blvd., and westbound from Southern Blvd. to Belmont Ave. Passenger vehicles including for-hire vehicles may make local trips by turning onto the busway from a side street and must make the first possible right turn off the busway. All left turns off the busway are prohibited, except trucks may turn left at Third Ave.
locations: Tremont Avenue eastbound from Third Ave. to Southern Blvd.
Tremont Avenue westbound from Southern Blvd. to Belmont Ave.

locations_normalized.raw_text: Tremont Avenue eastbound from Third Ave. to Southern Blvd.
Tremont Avenue westbound from Southern Blvd. to Belmont Ave.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 6 AM – 8 PM / 7 days a week

Only buses, trucks with 6+ wheels, Access-A-Ride vans, emergency vehicles, and bikes may travel all the way through on Tremont Ave., eastbound from Third Ave. to Southern Blvd., and westbound from Southern Blvd. to Belmont Ave.

Passenger vehicles, including for-hire vehicles, may make local trips by turning onto the busway from a side street. Passenger vehicles may expeditiously drop off and pick up passengers all along the busway.
After turning onto the busway, passenger vehicles must make the first possible right turn off the busway. All left turns off the busway are prohibited, except trucks may turn left at Third Ave.

tool_args.label: Tremont Ave Busway Enforcement
tool_args.raw_text: NYPD traffic agents and automated cameras enforce regulations by giving warnings and summonses. Violating bus lane rules results in a $50-$250 fine.

tool_args.label: Eastbound Busway exit rules by entry point
tool_args.raw_text: Traveling Eastbound: If you enter Tremont Ave. from Third and Lafayette Avenues, you must turn right to exit on Arthur Avenue. Enter from Belmont and Hughes Avenues, exit on Crotona Avenue. Enter from Clinton Avenue, exit on Clinton, Prospect and Mapes Avenues. Enter from Marmion Avenue, exit on Marmion Avenue. Enter from Southern Boulevard, exit on Southern Boulevard.

payload.description: Eastbound busway entry-to-exit rules: Enter from Third and Lafayette Avenues → exit on Arthur Avenue; Enter from Belmont and Hughes Avenues → exit on Crotona Avenue; Enter from Clinton Avenue → exit on Clinton, Prospect and Mapes Avenues; Enter from Marmion Avenue → exit on Marmion Avenue; Enter from Southern Boulevard → exit on Southern Boulevard.

evidence_refs.source_quote: If you enter Tremont Ave. from: You must turn right to exit on: Third and Lafayette Avenues Arthur Avenue Belmont and Hughes Avenues Crotona Avenue Crotona Avenue Clinton Avenue Clinton, Prospect and Mapes Avenues Marmion Avenue Marmion Avenue Southern Boulevard

tool_args.label: Westbound Busway exit rules by entry point
tool_args.raw_text: Traveling Westbound: If you enter Tremont Ave. from Southern Boulevard and Marmion Avenues, you must turn right to exit on Mapes Avenue. Enter from Prospect Avenue, exit on Prospect and Clinton Avenues. Enter from Crotona Avenue, exit on Crotona Avenue. Enter from Belmont Avenue, exit on Belmont Avenue.

payload.description: Westbound busway entry-to-exit rules: Enter from Southern Boulevard and Marmion Avenues → exit on Mapes Avenue; Enter from Prospect Avenue → exit on Prospect and Clinton Avenues; Enter from Crotona Avenue → exit on Crotona Avenue; Enter from Belmont Avenue → exit on Belmont Avenue.
